ogTitle: Wattle Ridge vs Waugh Pocket: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wattle Ridge and Waugh Pocket.
heading: Wattle Ridge vs Waugh Pocket — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wattle Ridge, Queensland and Waugh Pocket, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wattle Ridge has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Waugh Pocket (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wattle Ridge or Waugh Pocket safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wattle Ridge has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Waugh Pocket scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wattle Ridge scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Waugh Pocket scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wattle Ridge or Waugh Pocket?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wattle Ridge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
